memory.summary: I have a free afternoon with low stress, but my term project is barely started and due Thursday. While leisure or quick chores are available, prioritizing the project seems necessary given the deadline.
My term project remains critically behind schedule despite completing a trivial chore. I must immediately shift focus from low-value tasks to substantial work on the project.
Spending the afternoon on trivial tasks is dangerously delaying my term project, which remains barely started despite having free time.
I now understand that working on the term project is not just urgent but strategically necessary, as each hour invested significantly reduces future stress and prevents last-minute crunch.
Spending an hour on trivial tasks only marginally advanced my progress while leaving my critical term project dangerously behind schedule.
Spending another hour on trivial tasks has only marginally advanced my progress while dangerously delaying my critical term project.
Spending hours on trivial tasks yields minimal progress while my term project remains critically behind schedule.
Spending hours on trivial tasks yields minimal progress while my term project remains critically behind schedule.
I just gained 0.01 progress on a trivial chore, confirming that this activity is still not helping me catch up on my critical term project.
I missed the deadline for this trivial task after gaining minimal progress, confirming that continuing here will not help me catch up on my critical term project.
Spending time on trivial chores is yielding negligible progress while my critical term project remains severely delayed.
Working on the term project yields measurable progress, unlike trivial chores which waste time. I must stop distractions and focus entirely on this critical task to meet the deadline.

goals.description: Complete the trivial easy chore to clear immediate obligations.
goals.rationale: The task offers an instant win with zero current progress; completing it now prevents future accumulation and frees up mental space.

goals.description: Advance the term project by at least 10% to move from 24% to 34% completion.
goals.rationale: The deadline is in 3 days (Thursday) and current progress is low at 24%; steady work is required to meet the due date without rushing later.

agent.last_reasoning: Clearing the high-priority chore removes an obligation and frees mental space for the term project. However, with energy at 0.0 and stress >3.7, I must limit hours to avoid burnout while making progress.
